title: niphidium vittaria
intro: Niphidium vittaria, also known as the crested spleenwort or vittaria fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Niphidium vittaria are said to include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and processing the fronds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
